regulatoryFramework: Securities Act Rule 506(c); Investment Company Act Section 3(c)(7)
fundRegistration: Not registered as an investment company under the Investment Company Act of 1940
notes: SEC Form D identifies the issuer as BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund Ltd., classifies the filing as a Notice of Exempt Offering of Securities, claims Rule 506(c) and Investment Company Act Section 3(c)(7), and states that the issuer is not registered as an investment company under the Investment Company Act of 1940. The filing lists solicitation across all U.S. states and Securitize Markets, LLC as sales compensation recipient. The token is labeled a Security Token on Etherscan and is exclusively available through Securitize, supporting transfer-restricted treatment, but detailed transfer-rule logic should be verified in the blockchain layer. Public source-discovery sources did not provide a standalone AML policy URL, sanctions-screening policy, legal opinion, or explicit KYC policy URL, so those fields remain null.
